mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: Deformed microstructure after tensile straining (3% to 28% engineering strain). Ferrite: planar slip bands composed of edge, mixed, and screw dislocations; dynamic slip band refinement; dislocation pairing due to shearing of DO3 domains. Austenite: dislocation cell blocks, dislocation cells, and a small amount of deformation twins at high strain.

mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: High back stresses in soft austenite and forward stresses in hard ferrite generate high stresses at boundaries; stress multiplication facilitates collective glide of dislocations on the same slip plane, promoting planar slip and edge dislocation multiplication.
